race.comment: JAZZ ME BABY (13) resumes today with a recent trial win under her belt at Belmont. She was impressive on debut when flying late from the back of the pack in a $50k maiden. Looks to have plenty of ability and can make an impact on her return. SKYHIGH JOURNEY (10) makes his debut with the blinkers on following a nice trial coming into this at Belmont. He's found a suitable maiden for his debut and the 1200m journey looks ideal fresh. Looks set for a bold showing. MY DANNY BOY (5) returned in good order when beaten 3.9L at Ascot behind a smart one when favourite. Drawn wide again today, but he does have good early speed and should be fitter for the fresh effort. Can go one better. BOOKENDS (14) ticks a few boxes with Pike on board for team Williams. Wouldn't surprise to see her come out on top. VICTORY WAVE (6) has trialled well coming into this and can make an impression.
